name: Sealetrica
description:
cover art made by Rafscrap on YouTube, go check out her song covers, I live them, and her art is jaw dropping.

Sealetrica was born as a magical sea creature from an affair where her human mother fell for a sea dweller even though sea dwellers are looked down upon.

Her mother, being a powerful mage, increased her strength and power. Since sea dwellers were already powerful and strong, this made her a force to be reckoned with, as she grew so did her power and strength, her whole life she studied and practiced her abilities non stop, she trained her body to make her stronger and more agile, and all for the purpose of one day rising to a high position to make it clear that sea dwellers won’t be looked down upon no longer.

With her mind made up and her determination this quickly made her rise to position of Empress of the Ocean even though she didn’t possess a single drop of royal blood.

Some people speculate that she’s not just as sea dweller but secretly a sea monster pretending to be a magical creature.

She’s described as being scarily beautiful with the type of charm to intimidate people, Her tall and muscular stature with scaly teal blue tinted skin and piercing teal eyes that seem to glow when shrouded in dark with long black hair reaching her waist.

Her main reputation is being known as a violent tyrant who doesn’t believe in the world’s laws and listens only to her own judgment, her views have garnered widespread criticism amount everyone except her own people who wholeheartedly believe in her judgment.
creator: Shilo_16
